description: Convert raw EDC demographic records to CDISC SDTM DM domain format.

cases.task_description: Convert this raw EDC record to a valid SDTM DM domain record. Output a JSON object with only these fields: USUBJID, AGE, SEX, RACE, RFSTDTC, COUNTRY.
cases.study_context:
STUDY: CDISCPILOT01 — Type 2 Diabetes Phase 2 Trial

CDISC SDTM DM DOMAIN RULES:
- USUBJID = STUDYID + "-" + SITEID + "-" + SUBJID
- AGE = integer (years at consent)
- SEX: CDISC CT — "M" (Male) or "F" (Female)
- RACE: CDISC CT — "WHITE", "BLACK OR AFRICAN AMERICAN", "ASIAN", "AMERICAN INDIAN OR ALASKA NATIVE", "NATIVE HAWAIIAN OR OTHER PACIFIC ISLANDER"
- RFSTDTC = ISO 8601 format YYYY-MM-DD (date of first study treatment)
- COUNTRY = ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 code (e.g., "USA", "GBR", "DEU", "FRA", "CAN")
